title: Provision Cloudways Production Server and Wire Deploy Pipeline
description:
Provision a Cloudways production server to mirror the staging setup, using a separate SSH key for security isolation. Wire up the GitHub Actions deploy pipeline with an approval gate for production deployments.

This is a confirmation and validation task to ensure the production Cloudways application is properly configured.
acceptance_criteria: Deploy Production GitHub Actions workflow runs successfully with an approval gate
Staging and production use separate SSH keys
Production server is provisioned on Cloudways with the same configuration as staging
implementation_notes: Part of V3 Architecture Planning Phase 2. Mirrors the staging task but with production-specific SSH keys and an approval gate in the deploy workflow.
